selected_title: The Positive Impact Of Romania'S Accession To The European Union On The Activity Of Small And Medium-Sized Enterprises
question: What mechanism does Panait Mihaela identify in “The Positive Impact Of Romania'S Accession To The European Union On The Activity Of Small And Medium-Sized Enterprises” that deepens the evidence from “Decentralization and Local Governance in Lithuania”?

evidence_spans.text: Romania's accession to the European Union marked a moment of great positive influence for our country. Regarding the economy, we will see in this article the justification of Romania's desire to be among the countries included in the European Union. We will analyse Romania's power to implement the economic policies practiced by the European Union. This paper examines the positive and less beneficial aspects of Romania's accession to the European Union.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Accession, European union through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 71 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
